allow: PowerShell(cd "D:\\uni\\Arquitectura de Software\\Servicios\\Taller_Mecanico_Arqui_Servicios\\Frontend" && Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '\(bin|obj\)' } | Sort-Object)
